scripts.dev:services: concurrently "npm run dev:gateway" "npm run dev:auth" "npm run dev:products" "npm run dev:orders" "npm run dev:users"
scripts.build: cd services/gateway && npm run build && cd ../auth && npm run build && cd ../product-service && npm run build && cd ../orders && npm run build && cd ../user-service && npm run build
scripts.test: cd services/gateway && npm test && cd ../auth && npm test && cd ../product-service && npm test && cd ../orders && npm test && cd ../user-service && npm test
